title: filago pygmaea subsp. pygmaea
intro: Filago pygmaea subsp. pygmaea, also known as Dwarf cudweed, is a small flowering plant belonging to the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, making it useful in treating wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Filago pygmaea subsp. pygmaea include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from coughs and colds. Filago pygmaea subsp. pygmaea can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, often used to treat various health conditions due to its medicinal properties.
